title: Assistant Store Manager - Flipkart Books - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Flipkart Books - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
